TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Keith_Benson, title = Keith_Benson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Keith_Benson} }

S.FORM: Keith Benson hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 8, Keith Benson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Keith Benson hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 8, Keith Benson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: keitħ βens~ɕon ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ / pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, keitħ βens~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
